objective: Land reviewed community contributions and issue fixes onto opencodex dev as small provenance-preserving commits via repeated PABCD cycles with gpt-5.6-sol high priority subagents: (1) issue #146 install-guidance docs fix + issue #92 docs truth-alignment (unit 260718_issue146_92_docs_fix, decade docs already written); (2) absorb PR #145 (403 labels) onto dev with the 3 Sol P2 defects fixed, Wibias authorship preserved; (3) rebuild PR #147 (combo load balancing, issue #133) as a dependency-ordered small stack on dev fixing the P0 token leak and 5 P1s. Local commits only; no push, no GitHub comments, no PR close, no upstream filing without separate approval. Per-cycle verification: tsc, focused tests, broad bun test before final close.
